name: Refrigerator Protective Mat (Clear Polycarbonate)
pros: Over 15,500 Rakuten reviews at 4.67★ — exceptionally popular and trust-building signal
Transparent polycarbonate protects floors from scratches and dents without aesthetic impact
Works on heated floors, prevents condensation damage, and is easy to clean and reposition
cons: Passive product — solves a problem but doesn't actively improve appliance performance
Quality varies with thickness; thinner versions may shift if appliance is moved frequently
shortDescription: Best-selling protective mat for fridges and washers in Japanese homes.
review: This humble mat is a Japanese apartment essential that foreigners often overlook until their security deposit gets dinged. E-Kit's version is the market leader for good reason: crystal-clear material, genuine protection on heated floors, and almost absurd review volume. Cheap insurance against floor damage in rental properties.
